# 4. STRUCTURAL DIAGRAMS & SCHEMATICS

## 4.1 Master IIR Design Flow — Bilinear Transformation

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[START Digital Specs omega_p, omega_s, A_p, A_s] --> B[Pre-warp critical frequencies]
    B --> B1[Compute Omega_p = 2 slash T times tan of omega_p slash 2]
    B --> B2[Compute Omega_s = 2 slash T times tan of omega_s slash 2]
    B1 --> C[Design analog prototype H_a of s]
    B2 --> C
    C --> C1{Choose approximation}
    C1 -->|Butterworth| C2[Find order N and cutoff Omega_c]
    C1 -->|Chebyshev I| C3[Find order N and epsilon]
    C1 -->|Chebyshev II| C4[Find order N and stopband spec]
    C2 --> D[Construct H_a of s with normalized lowpass prototype]
    C3 --> D
    C4 --> D
    D --> E[Apply Bilinear Transformation]
    E --> E1[Substitute s equals 2 over T times z minus 1 over z plus 1]
    E1 --> F[Obtain H of z]
    F --> G[Verify stability all poles inside unit circle]
    G --> H[Realize using Direct Form I or II or Cascade]
    H --> I[END Digital IIR Filter H of z]
```

## 4.2 Impulse Invariance — Block-Level Functional Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A1[Analog Transfer Function H_a of s] --> A2[Partial Fraction Expansion]
    A2 --> A3[Identify poles p_k and residues R_k]
    A3 --> A4[Map each pole p_k to z_k = e to the power p_k T]
    A4 --> A5[Build H of z as sum of first order sections]
    A5 --> A6[Multiply whole expression by T]
    A6 --> A7[Digital Filter H of z with impulse response h of n = T h_a of nT]
```

## 4.3 Frequency Warping Visualization — Conceptual Flow

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    S1[Analog axis Omega from minus infinity to infinity] --> S2[Apply pre warping formula]
    S2 --> S3[Compute warped digital omega in minus pi to pi]
    S3 --> S4[Compress high frequencies near Nyquist]
    S4 --> S5[BLT maps s plane LHP to z plane inside unit circle]
    S5 --> S6[Stable digital IIR filter]
```

## 4.4 Pole-Zero Mapping Comparison (IIM vs BLT)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    P1[Analog pole p_k] --> Q1{Which method}
    Q1 -->|IIM| R1[Digital pole z_k = e to the p_k T]
    Q1 -->|BLT| R2[Digital pole z_k = 1 plus p_k T slash 2 over 1 minus p_k T slash 2]
    R1 --> S1[Map occurs along radial lines at angle Omega_k T]
    R2 --> S2[Conformal one to one map LHP to unit disk]
    S1 --> T1[Check aliasing at multiples of 2 pi slash T]
    S2 --> T2[Pre warp critical frequencies before design]
```
